g.title: container.user_bucket_item:bucket->container.user_bucket:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bucket) REFERENCES container.user_bucket(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.user_bucket_item:target_user->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_user) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.user_bucket_item_note:item->container.user_bucket_item:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (item) REFERENCES container.user_bucket_item(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
